steps.title: Use the photograph limitation
steps.content: The text says a two-dimensional photograph cannot capture how a building interacts with its surroundings, including whether it complements, blends with, or clashes with nearby sights and activities. The conclusion must follow from that missing spatial context.

steps.title: Reject unsupported effects
steps.content: Choice A brings in historical importance, which is not discussed. Choice C says the image misrepresents viewers' perceptions, but the text only says it omits context. Choice D concerns material deterioration, another topic not mentioned.

steps.title: State the missing impact
steps.content: The remaining choice says the image fails to convey the full impact of the building's design and structure. The answer is B.
